tasks.subject: Task 1: Google Fonts + CSS variables foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add fantasy fonts to index.html and establish all new CSS variables in style.css with sensible defaults.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Cinzel and EB Garamond load from Google Fonts
- [ ] All new CSS variables defined on :root with defaults
- [ ] --font-heading uses Cinzel, --font-body uses EB Garamond
- [ ] Existing layout still works

**Verify:** Open in browser → narrative text renders in EB Garamond, no layout breakage.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cinzel and EB Garamond load from Google Fonts", "All new CSS variables defined on :root", "--font-heading uses Cinzel, --font-body uses EB Garamond"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Viewport parchment frame
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the fixed full-viewport decorative frame as a non-interactive overlay.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] #frame div renders as a fixed border around entire viewport
- [ ] Multi-ring effect via border + outline + box-shadow
- [ ] pointer-events: none
- [ ] --border-outer, --border-inner, --border-corner-radius control appearance

**Verify:** Open in browser → decorative gold/brown frame visible around viewport edge.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["#frame renders as fixed border", "pointer-events: none", "CSS variables control appearance"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Two-region game layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restructure game layout so narrative scrolls independently and choices are pinned at bottom with decorative divider.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Narrative pane fills available height and scrolls independently
- [ ] Choices footer always visible at bottom
- [ ] Decorative divider separates regions
- [ ] renderShell outputs #choices-footer

**Verify:** Open story — narrative above, choices pinned at bottom with divider.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css", "engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Narrative scrolls independently", "Choices always visible at bottom", "Decorative divider between regions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Narrative accumulation across scenes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Text accumulates in the narrative pane across scenes within an act instead of replacing.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Navigating appends text to #narrative rather than replacing
- [ ] Narrative pane auto-scrolls to bottom when new blocks appear
- [ ] Scene separator injected between scenes within same act
- [ ] Speech blocks render italic in quotes

**Verify:** Play through two scenes — both scenes' text visible, appended with separator.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Text accumulates across scenes", "Auto-scrolls to new content", "Scene separator visible", "Speech blocks italic and quoted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Drop caps and speech styling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** First paragraph of each scene gets a large drop cap. Speech blocks render italic in quotes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] .scene-opener::first-letter renders large (~3.5em), floated left, in Cinzel
- [ ] Drop cap color is --drop-cap-color
- [ ] .speech-block renders italic

**Verify:** Open demo story — first paragraph has large decorative initial letter, dialogue is italic and quoted.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Drop cap on first paragraph of each scene", "Drop cap uses Cinzel font", "Speech blocks italic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Act titles — injection, styling, animation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Engine detects act: field on scenes, clears narrative on act change, injects styled act title with fade+scale animation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] currentAct tracked as module-level variable
- [ ] Act change triggers narrative clear + title injection
- [ ] Act title HTML matches spec structure
- [ ] Act title animates in: opacity 0 scale(1.05) → opacity 1 scale(1)
- [ ] currentAct resets to null on new game

**Verify:** Add act: "Act I" to start.yaml, load story — act title appears with animation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser with act field in start.yaml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["currentAct tracked", "Act change clears narrative and injects title", "Title animates in with fade+scale"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Act title audio + post-audio delay
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Engine plays act title audio after title animates in, then waits ACT_TITLE_PAUSE_MS before starting scene blocks.

**Files:**
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ACT_TITLE_PAUSE_MS constant = 2000
- [ ] Slug derived correctly from act string
- [ ] Plays stories/{id}/audio/{slug}.opus if found, silently skips if not
- [ ] After audio ends, waits ACT_TITLE_PAUSE_MS then starts scene blocks
- [ ] Normal scenes play blocks immediately

**Verify:** Place test .opus at stories/demo/audio/act_i.opus — plays after title, scene text starts ~2s later.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "place test opus file and open in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ACT_TITLE_PAUSE_MS = 2000", "Correct slug from act string", "Audio plays then delays before scene blocks"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Animations — blocks, choices, choice fade-on-select
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Polish all animations: block reveal, choice list slide-up, and choice fade-on-select.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`
- Modify: `engine.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Text blocks fade in and slide up using --anim-block-duration
- [ ] Choice list slides up as group using --anim-choice-duration
- [ ] On choice click: unchosen → 0.2 opacity, chosen → 0 opacity
- [ ] Navigation happens after fade completes

**Verify:** Play demo — text reveals, choices slide up, clicking a choice ghosts others and fades chosen before scene changes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css", "engine.js"], "verifyCommand": "open in browser and play through scenes", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Block fade+slide animation", "Choice list slides up as group", "Choice fade-on-select with correct opacities"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Update stage-0-discovery.md with new CSS variables
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the variable reference in stage 0 so storycraft AI knows to override all new variables.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/storycrafting/stage-0-discovery.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All new CSS variables from spec appear in stage 0 variable reference
- [ ] Each variable has brief comment explaining its role
- [ ] Existing variables unchanged

**Verify:** Read the file — new variables present with descriptions.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/storycrafting/stage-0-discovery.md"], "verifyCommand": "read file", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All new CSS variables listed", "Each has description comment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Demo story — add act field + theme.css
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up demo story to exercise new features: add act: to start scene, create theme.css.

**Files:**
- Modify: `stories/demo/scenes/start.yaml`
- Create: `stories/demo/theme.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] start.yaml has act: "Act I"
- [ ] stories/demo/theme.css exists with all variables overridden
- [ ] Demo story renders with act title on load and new game

**Verify:** Load demo story — "Act I" title appears with animation, narrative text begins.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["stories/demo/scenes/start.yaml", "stories/demo/theme.css"], "verifyCommand": "open demo story in browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["start.yaml has act field", "theme.css exists with all variables", "Act title renders on load"]}
```
